customers.name: Abercrombie, Kristy
customers.notes:
9/15/2003:  Send Kristy estimate for den remodel.

9/20/2003:  Called Kristy to discuss job:  Kristy is not interested at this time.  Estimate was competitive, not using another firm.

10/15/2003:  Further discussion of bathroom remodel.  I offered 10% discount on project if she would sign the contract now.

customers.name: Cook, Brian
customers.notes:
10/15/2003:  Called to talk about us doing some work in their upstairs.

10/20/2003:  Shook hands on doing some work on their second floor.

11/17/2003:  Carol called and didn't like the spackle job.

customers.name: Easley, Paula
customers.notes:
7/15/2002:  Estimate given to Paula  

8/09/2002:  Paula called and gave go ahead on project

8/19/2002:  Began work on project, received partial payment

customers.name: Ecker Designs
customers.notes:
12/5/2003:  Called for an estimate on repair work due to water damage.  Heard about us through Joe Madsen.

12/11/2003:  Called to let me know that her neighbors complained when we started working before 7:00 AM.

12/14/2003:  Wants to know how much we can get done by Christmas.

customers.name: Freeman, Kirby
customers.notes:
11/27/2002:  Estimate mailed to Mr. Freeman.

12/03/2002:  Received signed estimate accepting estimate.
Called customer and set start date of project for 12/09.

12/30/2002:  Customer called to express thanks for fast, professional job.   

01/07/2003:  Receive thank you letter and photos of before and after for our portfolio.  Mr. Freeman will contact us when he is ready for the kitchen remodeling.

customers.name: Jacobsen, Doug
customers.notes:
12/10/2003: Doug called to get a quote on building him a new poolhouse.  I told him it would probably run at least $25,000.

12/13/2003:  Doug called about getting a more detailed estimate on the poolhouse and gave specifications for flooring and doors.

customers.name: Lew Plumbing - C
customers.notes:
Lew Plumbing is also a Vendor 
See the Vendor list

customers.name: Melton, Johnny
customers.notes:
10/18/2003:  Received call from Johnny.  Dental office damaged in earthquake  Needs to rebuild.  

10/29/2003: Johnny called to give verbal approval of work to be done rebuilding dental office.

customers.name: Room Addition
customers.notes: See Estimate (bid) dated 2/03/2003

customers.name: Natiello, Ernesto
customers.notes:
11/10/2003:  Ernie called, thinks the estimate is too high.

11/12/2003:  Met with Ernie to discuss estimate in detail. He agreed that the price is fair.

11/29/2003:  Ernie called and loves the work we did.  Thankful that we finished in time for turkey dinner.

customers.name: Nelson, Wilma
customers.notes: 9/15/2003:  Customer call to state she accepted the estimate and wants work to begin Jan 15.

customers.name: Nguyen, Tuan
customers.notes:
8/20/2003:  Received signed estimate.  Work to begin 8/25

10/15/2003:  Called customer for payment - hospitalized.

11/07/2003:  Customer called and stated would not have balance until after 12/06 first check after back to work.   Agreed to not send to collections.

customers.name: Overhead
customers.notes: Use "Overhead" for expenses that aren't related to a specific Customer:Job

customers.name: Pretell Real Estate
customers.notes:
4/27/2003:  Dixie Lee needs work done on her Wilks Blvd property.

7/15/2003:  Loved everything we did except the color of the grout.

9/15/2003:  Dixie Lee called about getting an estimate for 75 Sunset.  

10/1/2003:  Dixie Lee called to give the go ahead

customers.name: Robson, Darci
customers.notes: 11/26/2003:  Customer wants it done before the first of the year.

customers.name: Ruff, Bryan
customers.notes:
07/09/2002: Saw truck while driving and called for an estimate.
Scheduled appt. for 7/12 to see what we can do.

07/12/2002:Mr. Ruff wants to add sun room.  Prepared the estimate and agreed to it on the spot with out other estimates.

customers.name: Smith, Lee
customers.notes:
08/27/2003:  Mr. Smith invoiced for patio at studio.

08/29/2003:  Shannon brought in down payment.

11/03/2003:  Mr. Smith called - appologies for delay in pament.
Studio robbed.  A payment will be coming shortly. 

11/11/2003:  Shannon brought in payment.  Will not charge further FC on outstanding balance.

customers.name: Teschner, Anton

Anton has refused to pay for services rendered

customers.name: Wilks, Daniel
customers.notes: 02/07/2003: Mr. Wilks called.  Referred by Bryan Ruff.  Wants to have the master bathroom remodeled. Set 02/17/2003 to start work.
